title: 02-audit.json — test audit for one unit
description: Source of truth for 02-audit.md. Captures files reviewed, anti-patterns found, and per-field coverage notes. Anti-pattern bodies are prose stored in rationale_md fields.

test_inventory.description: Reconciliation numbers — grep_count must equal agent_count (enforced by grader B11).

grep_count.description: Number of `it`/`test` blocks discovered via grep.

agent_count.description: Number the agent enumerated. MUST equal grep_count.

recommendation.description: One-line actionable fix; full reasoning lives in rationale_md.

rationale_md.description: Full prose explanation including code snippets in fenced blocks. Rendered verbatim.

per_field_coverage.description: Per-field notes — one entry per contract field from 01-extraction.json. Used as the audit-side view that feeds per-type gap analysis.

field.description: Qualified field name, e.g. 'request field: transaction.amount', 'db field: wallet.balance (assertion)', 'outbound request field: amount'.

scenarios.description: Per-scenario coverage checklist (e.g. for Authorization: 'missing → 401', 'invalid → 401', 'wrong-user → 403'). When present, renders as a table above notes_md. Drives per-type gap punchlists.

location.description: Test file:line where this scenario is covered, or '—' if missing.

coverage_summary_md.description: Optional narrative paragraph summarizing overall audit findings.
